requirement.title: On-Demand LLM Failure Explanation
requirement.goal: Cho phep user yeu cau giai thich test case that bai bang LLM dua tren output deterministic cua FE-07 va FE-08. Giai thich chi mang tinh advisory, khong duoc thay doi pass/fail.
rationale: FE-07 va FE-08 da cung cap failed result surface on dinh: failure reasons, actual status, response body preview, validation flags, dependency skip context.
ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant da co san LlmInteraction va LlmSuggestionCache, co the reuse de audit va cache explanation ma khong can tao bang moi.
Codebase hien tai chua wire LlmAssistant vao host Background. API on-demand dong bo se cho gia tri nhanh nhat va it rui ro nhat cho FE-09 v1.
Workflow async queue trong docs/features/FE-09-acceptance-criteria/FE-09-01 duoc giu lam future extension sau khi API-first version da on dinh.

inScope: Them API de GET cached explanation va POST yeu cau tao failure explanation cho mot failed test case.
Them cross-module read gateway tu TestExecution sang LlmAssistant de lay suite ownership, run summary, failed case result, va test case definition.
Reuse LlmInteraction voi InteractionType=FailureExplanation de luu audit thong tin LLM request/response.
Reuse LlmSuggestionCache de cache serialized failure explanation theo fingerprint co TTL 24h.
Build prompt tu deterministic inputs: test case definition, expectation, failure reasons, actual HTTP result, va endpoint metadata khi co.
Mask sensitive headers/variables/body values truoc khi gui sang LLM provider va truoc khi cache explanation.
Ho tro fallback graceful khi khong co endpoint metadata: van giai thich dua tren request/response va validation failures.
Su dung dedicated LlmAssistant runtime service va HTTP client de goi provider or n8n webhook.
Them unit tests cho gateway, fingerprinting, prompt builder, explainer service, command/query handlers.
outOfScope: RabbitMQ consumer, dead-letter queue, Background worker, retry queue orchestration cho FE-09 v1.
Tu dong tao explanation ngay sau moi failed test run khong co user request.
Thay doi logic deterministic pass/fail hoac thay doi counters/status cua TestRun sau khi explanation duoc tao.
Them bang moi, entity moi, hoac migration moi cho FE-09 v1.
Bulk review, user feedback, bulk approve/reject cho LLM suggestions (FE-15, FE-16, FE-17).

requiredFeatures.reason: Can test run summary va cache-backed per-case execution results.
Can deterministic validation failures lam dau vao duy nhat cho giai thich.
ExecutionEnvironment va suite ownership da ton tai tu luong execution.
Can request/expectation/test-case definition goc de so sanh expected vs actual.
Can noi dung LlmAssistant audit/cache primitives da duoc dung cho LLM workflow truoc do.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestExecution
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: LlmAssistant khong doc TestExecutionDbContext hoac RedisKey truc tiep. Phai di qua contract gateway moi trong ClassifiedAds.Contracts.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: TestExecution gateway co the reuse ITestExecutionReadGatewayService de lay test case definition goc.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.ApiDocumentation
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: Dung IApiEndpointMetadataService de bo sung operation/path/response schema context cho prompt.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Contracts.Identity
requiredModules.usage: ICurrentUser de validate ownership tren GET/POST explanation APIs.

newCrossModuleContracts.name: ITestFailureReadGatewayService
newCrossModuleContracts.purpose: Expose failed test case explanation context tu TestExecution sang LlmAssistant ma khong vo modular boundary.

database.reason: Explanation cache co the tai su dung llmassistant.LlmSuggestionCaches. Audit co the tai su dung llmassistant.LlmInteractions.

architectureDecisions.executionMode: Synchronous request-response, on-demand per failed test case, cache-backed.

resultStorage.summary: Khong tao summary moi. Explanation response duoc tra truc tiep qua API.
resultStorage.cacheKey: SHA256 fingerprint truncated to hex prefix, combined voi endpointId va SuggestionType=FailureExplanation

designPrinciples: LlmAssistant khong reference TestExecution DbContext, TestRun repository, hoac distributed cache implementation.
Failure explanation phai consume dau vao deterministic; no khong duoc sua status hoac validation failures da co.
Sensitive request/response data phai duoc sanitize truoc khi build prompt, audit, va cache.
Provider integration phai nam trong LlmAssistant, khong duoc reference truc tiep IN8nIntegrationService cua TestGeneration.
GET explanation chi doc cache; POST explanation co the generate live neu cache miss.
V1 cho phep TestExecution gateway load full execution context mot lan va filter test case, vi endpoint la on-demand va LLM latency lon hon chi phi read context.

sensitiveDataRules: Mask Authorization, Cookie, Set-Cookie, X-Api-Key va cac key chua token, secret, password, apiKey.
Khong gui binary hoac body qua lon sang LLM; body previews phai duoc truncate hop ly truoc khi prompt.
Khong luu raw secrets vao LlmInteraction.InputContext hoac LlmSuggestionCache.Suggestions.

gracefulDegradation: Neu endpoint metadata khong co, van tao explanation dua tren failure reasons + request/response context.
Neu save audit fail, log warning va van tra live explanation.
Neu cache save fail, log warning va van tra live explanation.
Neu provider fail, API tra loi co kiem soat va khong ghi cache rac.

acceptanceCriteria: AC-01: POST /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/test-runs/{runId}/failures/{testCaseId}/explanation tra 200 voi FailureExplanationModel cho mot test case co Status=Failed.
AC-02: GET cung route tra cached explanation neu da ton tai; neu chua co thi tra 404 FAILURE_EXPLANATION_NOT_FOUND.
AC-03: Neu POST gap cung fingerprint trong thoi gian TTL thi he thong tra cached explanation va khong goi live LLM provider.
AC-04: Failure explanation context bao gom suite access info, test case definition, deterministic failure reasons, actual response info, va endpoint metadata khi co.
AC-05: Explanation khong duoc thay doi TestRun.Status, counters, hoac validation result cua FE-08.
AC-06: Moi live generation thanh cong deu luu 1 LlmInteraction voi InteractionType=FailureExplanation.
AC-07: Moi live generation thanh cong deu cache serialized explanation vao LlmSuggestionCache voi SuggestionType=FailureExplanation va TTL 24h.
AC-08: Neu test case khong phai Failed thi API tra conflict co code TEST_CASE_NOT_FAILED.
AC-09: Neu run results da het han cache thi API bubble controlled conflict RUN_RESULTS_EXPIRED.
AC-10: Prompt payload va cache payload khong chua secrets da biet trong headers, body previews, hoac extracted variables.
AC-11: He thong van tao explanation khi khong co endpoint metadata, mien la deterministic failure context van ton tai.
AC-12: Khong co migration moi, khong co direct TestExecution DbContext access xuyen module.
AC-13: Targeted unit tests moi cho LlmAssistant va TestExecution deu green.
implementationOrder: 1. Tao contract gateway moi trong ClassifiedAds.Contracts/TestExecution va implementation doc failed-context trong TestExecution.
2. Implement runtime layer trong LlmAssistant: fingerprint, sanitizer, prompt builder, provider client, cache/audit reuse.
3. Them command/query/controller surface va bind config cho WebAPI.
4. Them unit tests va targeted verification commands.
